description: Create a content slide with a large left-side hero image and a right-side text block featuring a multi-line headline, supporting paragraph, highlighted quote, and source footnote.

header.headline: Slide title to go here, can fit on one or two lines if needed

left.body: Large decorative/hero image occupying the left column.

right.body:
Body copy placeholder text describing the topic in paragraph form.

Highlighted quote or callout statement set apart from the body copy.

Source / attribution footnote at the bottom.
